raw_consumer_statement:
POST FOR CONSUMERS DO NOT GET A BESTBUY CITIBANK CARD.

I am getting messages from Citibank that I owe money for something I did not purchase. I learned that they switched my son 's BestBuy account over to my name for reasons I do not understand. I have called 3 months in a row and each month I get a different story on what is going on. Last month they were to close my account and credit my account for the fees they had charged. And today I get another message from CitiBank that my Best Buy account is past due and I owe {$8.00}. and change. I am now on the phone trying to correct. Now I was just told that the fee is mine and I need to contact XXXX and she hung up on me. i don't even own an XXXX XXXX. 
I believe BestBuy and CitiBank have a legitimate scam going on. If you end up in this position there is NO WAY TO RESOLVE IT. You get overseas help that can not speak XXXX and they say anything to pretend they are resolving the issue. BestBuy will NOT help and CitiBank can not even be reached.??????
